name: Peoples State Bank
description_short: Peoples State Bank is a traditional community bank offering checking, savings, CDs, and IRAs with 24-hour online and telephone banking access.
description_long: Peoples State Bank operates as a community-focused financial institution with a physical banking presence and comprehensive digital access options. The bank serves customers through local branch locations while emphasizing personal service from a "friendly group of people willing to work hard to meet your banking needs." The institution is FDIC-insured and maintains a routing number (103112743) consistent with established banking operations. Their website indicates they have been serving customers for an extended period, though specific founding details are not provided on the current site. Peoples State Bank offers a traditional banking product suite including checking accounts, savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) with rates described as "competitive" though subject to daily changes. They position themselves on competitive rate offerings across deposit products rather than specialized lending or investment services. The bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on 24-hour accessibility via multiple channels—in-person at physical branches during specified hours, plus telephone banking and internet banking (TeleWeb) available around the clock. Their service model reflects a hybrid approach: maintaining traditional brick-and-mortar locations while investing in digital banking infrastructure. An honest assessment reveals this is a conventional regional bank without notable innovations, specialized services, or visible marketing of advanced fintech features. The website design and technology (mentions Quicken 2006 and Microsoft Money compatibility, powered by DCI) suggest the platform may not represent cutting-edge digital banking, and the lack of detailed product information, rate transparency, or modern online features makes comprehensive comparison difficult for prospective customers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with competitive rates
ATM services via Transfund and Cirrus Networks
Internet banking (TeleWeb) with fund transfers and bill payment
Safe deposit boxes in various sizes
Downloads to Quicken and Microsoft Money
pros: 24-hour telephone banking (Telebank) via touch-tone access for checking balances, transfers, and loan payments
Internet banking (TeleWeb) available from any computer with web browser access
ATM access through Transfund and Cirrus Networks for worldwide service
Competitive rates on CDs, IRAs, and savings accounts
Safe deposit boxes available in various sizes
Fund transfer and loan payment capabilities through multiple channels
FDIC-insured deposits with clear reference to FDIC coverage
cons: Website technology appears outdated (mentions Quicken 2006 compatibility, which is 17+ years old)
No transparent rate information displayed on website; customers required to call branches for current rates
Limited service details and product offerings described compared to modern banks
No mobile app or mobile banking explicitly mentioned on services page
Routing number and basic information provided, but no details on account minimums, fees, or deposit insurance limits
best_for: Small-town or rural customers who prefer in-person banking relationships with local branch staff
Customers seeking basic savings, checking, and CD products without complex financial needs
Users comfortable with telephone and web-based banking who value 24-hour access over advanced digital features
diagnosis: Peoples State Bank is best suited for traditional banking customers who value community relationships and 24-hour account access through established channels (phone and web), without requiring modern mobile banking or advanced digital features. The primary caveat is that product rates, account minimums, and detailed terms are not transparently displayed online, requiring direct customer contact with local branches for critical information before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
